title: Bitcoin Mining Profitability Calculator
subtitle: Enter your mining hardware specs and electricity costs to estimate profits
note_1: Actual profit may vary due to changes in network difficulty, electricity rates, or hardware failure.
note_2: Please consider pool fees, hardware depreciation, and maintenance costs.
note_3: Electricity costs have the biggest impact on profitability, so please enter accurate rates.
disclaimer_text: This calculator is for reference only and does not guarantee actual mining profits. Thorough review is required before making investment decisions.
